name: supabase
description: Connect Codex to Supabase through hosted or local MCP servers.

interface.shortDescription: Use Supabase MCP from this workspace
interface.longDescription: Adds safe Supabase MCP connections for SecretSauce, including the hosted Supabase endpoint in read-only mode and the local Supabase CLI MCP server for schema and migration work.
defaultPrompt: List the tables in my Supabase project
Generate TypeScript types from my schema
Check advisors before I ship a migration
